title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions:
Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books Ventures Solutions!
